title: Simple Legacy Gamma
description: Simply reimplements the gamma system from Legacy console Minecraft.
body:
# ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d24eb61600cbcc4b020950fddf922758b8220a9f_0.webp)

## About

Simple Legacy Gamma is a mod that does exactly what it says it does, it recreates the gamma system from Minecraft Legacy Console under Java edition.

## Features

- Near 1:1 Complete recreation of the legacy console gamma
- Applies ingame and in UIs, just like LCE
- Doesnt require fabulous graphics
- FPS friendly

## Why did I make this?

I liked using Legacy 4J, it was a fantastic recreation of Legacy Console Edition with many parts of it's UI feeling 1:1. And as good as it is, it breaks with servers like LEM, so I thought to myself that if I can't have all of Legacy 4J playing there, I could at least try to make a mod that recreates the gamma which would have made playing it feel so much more authentic... And so I did, and heres the mod!
